req.title: Search patients (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall search patients by name, MRN, or DOB; only patients in their care shall be returned. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-038 requires patient search by name/MRN/DOB with care-team scoping, access logging, and correct error handling for malformed queries. I selected: (1) EP positive – valid name search returns only care-team patients; (2) NEG – malformed DOB yields 400; (3) BVA – DOB at exact midnight boundary (00:00:00) is handled correctly; (4) DT – clinician with no assigned patients returns empty bundle (not 403/500); (5) EP – MRN search returns correct scoped result. Together these cover the main equivalence classes, boundary timestamps, negative path, and a decision-table scenario for the empty-result branch.

tests.name: test_search_by_name_returns_scoped_patients
preconditions: At least one patient named 'Smith' is assigned to the clinician in <fixture:seeded_patients>
No patient named 'Smith' belongs to a different clinician
actions: GET /Patient?search with query param name=Smith and clinician auth header
expected: Response body is a FHIR Bundle with resourceType='Bundle'
All entries have family name containing 'Smith'
Access log entry created for this search (verified via <helper_fn:get_audit_log>)
trace: R-HLT-038: only patients in care returned
tests.executable:
def test_search_by_name_returns_scoped_patients(clinician_auth_headers, seeded_patients, api_client, get_audit_log):
    resp = api_client.get("/Patient?search", params={"name": "Smith"}, headers=clinician_auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert bundle["resourceType"] == "Bundle"
    entries = bundle.get("entry", [])
    assert len(entries) > 0, "Expected at least one Smith patient"
    for e in entries:
        names = e["resource"]["name"]
        family_names = [n.get("family", "") for n in names]
        assert any("Smith" in fn for fn in family_names), f"Unexpected patient: {family_names}"
    clinician_id = clinician_auth_headers["X-Clinician-Id"]
    logs = get_audit_log(clinician_id, action="search", resource="Patient")
    assert len(logs) >= 1, "Access log entry not found"

tests.name: test_malformed_dob_returns_400
actions: GET /Patient?search with query param birthdate=not-a-date (invalid format)
expected: Response body contains an OperationOutcome resource
trace: R-HLT-038: error pathway – 400 when query malformed
tests.executable:
def test_malformed_dob_returns_400(clinician_auth_headers, api_client):
    resp = api_client.get("/Patient?search", params={"birthdate": "not-a-date"}, headers=clinician_auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "OperationOutcome", "Expected OperationOutcome"
    issues = body.get("issue", [])
    assert len(issues) > 0, "OperationOutcome must contain at least one issue"
    severities = [i.get("severity") for i in issues]
    assert "error" in severities, f"Expected error severity, got {severities}"
    diagnostics = " ".join(i.get("diagnostics", "") for i in issues).lower()
    assert "birthdate" in diagnostics or "invalid" in diagnostics

tests.name: test_dob_midnight_boundary_timestamp
preconditions: Patient with DOB '1990-06-15' (midnight, no time component) assigned to clinician exists in <fixture:seeded_patients>
actions: GET /Patient?search with birthdate=1990-06-15 (date-only, boundary of datetime precision)
expected: Both bundles contain the patient born on 1990-06-15
No 400 or 500 error on midnight timestamp format
trace: R-HLT-038: boundary cases on timestamps must be tested
tests.executable:
def test_dob_midnight_boundary_timestamp(clinician_auth_headers, seeded_patients, api_client):
    target_dob = "1990-06-15"
    for dob_param in [target_dob, f"{target_dob}T00:00:00"]:
        resp = api_client.get("/Patient?search", params={"birthdate": dob_param}, headers=clinician_auth_headers)
        assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Unexpected status for param '{dob_param}': {resp.status_code}"
        bundle = resp.json()
        assert bundle["resourceType"] == "Bundle"
        dobs = [e["resource"].get("birthDate", "") for e in bundle.get("entry", [])]
        assert any(d.startswith(target_dob) for d in dobs), (
            f"Patient with DOB {target_dob} not found for param '{dob_param}'. Got: {dobs}"
        )

tests.name: test_clinician_with_no_patients_returns_empty_bundle
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token for a clinician with zero assigned patients via <fixture:empty_panel_clinician_auth_headers>
actions: GET /Patient?search with name=Smith using the empty-panel clinician credentials
expected: Response is a FHIR Bundle with total=0 or empty entry array
No patients from other clinicians are leaked
trace: R-HLT-038: only patients in care returned
R-HLT-038: decision – clinician has no care-team patients
tests.executable:
def test_clinician_with_no_patients_returns_empty_bundle(empty_panel_clinician_auth_headers, api_client):
    resp = api_client.get("/Patient?search", params={"name": "Smith"}, headers=empty_panel_clinician_auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}"
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert bundle["resourceType"] == "Bundle"
    total = bundle.get("total", len(bundle.get("entry", [])))
    assert total == 0, f"Expected 0 results for empty-panel clinician, got {total}"

tests.name: test_search_by_mrn_returns_scoped_patient
preconditions: Patient with MRN '00042987' is assigned to the clinician in <fixture:seeded_patients>
MRN '00042987' belongs exclusively to one patient record
actions: GET /Patient?search with query param identifier=00042987 and clinician auth header
expected: Patient is within the clinician's care team (not a foreign patient)
trace: R-HLT-038: only patients in care returned
R-HLT-038: boundary cases on numeric elements (MRN leading zeros preserved)
tests.executable:
def test_search_by_mrn_returns_scoped_patient(clinician_auth_headers, seeded_patients, api_client):
    target_mrn = "00042987"
    resp = api_client.get("/Patient?search", params={"identifier": target_mrn}, headers=clinician_auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert bundle["resourceType"] == "Bundle"
    entries = bundle.get("entry", [])
    assert len(entries) == 1, f"Expected exactly 1 result, got {len(entries)}"
    identifiers = entries[0]["resource"].get("identifier", [])
    values = [i.get("value", "") for i in identifiers]
    assert target_mrn in values, f"MRN {target_mrn} not found in {values}"
